reviews.review_text:
ANN and DAVE,
Helped us out when needed,
Great place too stay away from the hussle of life but close enough too keep in Tourch,
Thank you

Beautiful Caravan Park with friendly owners. Sites are fairly private and the grounds are well manicured with an array of tropical plants. Each site has it's own bin which is emptied daily. The toilets and showers are spotless and easy-listening music is played throughout the day. There is a laundry area with washing machines, dryers and an ironing board plus several long washing lines. In the laundry area, there are draws full of books and magazines.  We didn't use the kitchen area but could see it was also a great area for people to meet up and have a beer! There is a Hotel adjacent to the park which serves meals, we didn't go there though so can't comment. The creek flowing alongside the grounds is beautiful- our dogs loved their daily swim. I would definitely recommend staying here, we stayed for a week but could happily have stayed longer.

I will give it five stars but I have not been there yet. I just found the management team very friendly and the wife and the husband very helpful. I went to look for a friend and hopefully one day I'll have a chance to stay there but they were great

We are so grateful to Fishery Falls, and Ann especially!
I book this Park for my employees as they pass through to Cairns, and it is a wonderful stop for them to make.
Ann is friendly and always accomodating.
Thank-you very much for always looking after us!
Holly (and Wayne)
staff lovely amenities spotless lovely caravan park

Me and my partner stayed here for about three months looking for a rental we both wish we didn’t waste our money on a place like this and the whole time we were ignored! There’s constantly yelling and a guy getting attacked, The cleaners were so loud and always yelled out to me for rubbish that I didn’t have yet? ,The owner David would wait till my partner was gone to yell at me both times like he was trying to intimidate me haha about the dogs barking and told me to kill my puppies that were two weeks old cause apparently they were barking when they weren’t we just always coped the shit from other dogs barking! As owner in a rv next to us would leave their dog all day and night inside while they were away! I’ve told everyone about this place and no one wants to go as it’s shit! Save yourself the money!! Go to tasmans
Service is 100 stars! Really nice place, quiet and close to tablelands and waterfalls. A gem!
Old, clean, adequate, $189.00 overnight stay.

Helpful owners.  Beautiful grassy large sites set amongst tropical foliage.  Facilities clean and well maintained.  Love the retro tiles and furnishings and 70's music played whilst using these!  At the back is a shallow creek to cool off in.  On Sat night they put on a generous meal of Thai food in the camp kitchen.  The pub is at the back for dinner too
I'll come here again

43 kms south of Cairns but better by heaps than the NRMA site in Cairns. Nice location with entertainment and a meal on Saturday night. Big grassy sites and the pub overlooking the Bruce highway. Well maintained ablution block, laundry and extensive camp kitchen. Its behind the hotel so it's quiet
Ok not so where I would return to, pricey for what it is
Beautiful scenic and quiet, the perfect spot to take a breath and relax

Top spot to chill or use as a base for daily trips. The best Facilities and super clean!😲
Dave and Ann are very friendly and accomodating. Site no 11 was lovely and peaceful. Gardens are lovely, can’t fault anything other than WIFI poor , but there’s upgrading in place.
Thank you, wish we could’ve stayed longer 💕
Sam & Rita

We had the best stay here at this beautiful park. Management couldn’t have been nicer and we were lucky enough to be there for the Saturday night live music and Thai food. Well done Dave and Ann 10/10.
We had a great stay, loved Saturday Thai night & Entertainment, very clean tidy park and great amenities with music, great friendly staff & local permanents.  Thank you Dave & Anne 😊👍
Full of permanents and multiple dogs barking. Its typical of a park full of long term, like a shanty town. At $56 a night its not worth it. Very disappointed.
Beautiful park, grassy sites, lovely community spirit. Much better than camping in the middle of Cairns.

After being unable to find any accommodation in Cairns we found this place.  Arrived with short notice late at night. Wre given a room in a 40 foot donga under a tin shed.   Could have been the best place we stayed while in NQ.  Hosts were very nice.  Dog friendly . Human friendly.   Highly recommend
Great place to stay

Fishery Falls Holiday Park is an EXCELLENT base to spend some time visiting various attractions or just chilling out. Shopping facilities are close by for those needing to stock up before hitting the road again.

Owned and run by Ann and Dave. They, and their staff, provide such a friendly service, clean facilities, beautiful shady or sunny sites, great laundry area and the camp kitchens are neat and tidy.

We had "the best seat in the house"! Dave located us right next to a beautiful garden with our own creek access. The sound of the birds and the flowing water was very relaxing. We intended staying for 3 nights and ended up staying for 13 nights. We would CERTAINLY  recommend a stay at Fishery Falls. We will be back. Thanks Ann, Dave and team.
Best regards Dee and Pete.

Central location
People with dogs that bark constantly ...permanent residents ...guy with a staffy is super intrusive and annoying

Sites have trees that encroach and not much space for a van anddd a car

Had a lovely stay. David and Anne thank you for your hospitality. Very much appreciated.
Quiet, clean, peaceful, a beautiful place to be.

They are rip off with charging us more for a powered site for a camper trailer overnight. From $48 over the phone then became $52. On the day they want $55.  The lady charged us more for a powered site. Not accommodating owner. Never again going to stay here.

This place was the best camp site we ever stayed at!!! The owners were incredibly welcoming and helped us out where they could! We stayed here for 2 nights after our van broke down and they were extremely hospitable! Lots of love to Gail and co!❤️
Caravan Park, with the cleanest facilities any where.....good room on sites,

Stayed in a donga, paid $450 first 4wks then dropped to $400 a wk after.

Next to ventilation in bathroom i had to buy a fan for circulation due to having wiping mould from walls down daily.

Mould in main part of donga due to only a small.window an no air flow for circulation.

Phone reception was crap YOU have to sit in or near your car to get full reception due to owner placing a huge shed over the top of the dongas.

When it rained you needed gumboots to walk to your car due to amount of water laying around where dongas are located.

Washing machines are way over priced $5 per load (works out to be half load due to machine sizes) drier was old and took forever to dry clothes.

I reported the mould issue so many times to the owner and she would reply with " yes I had to throw out a $300 dollar pair if shoes due to mould" ( I throw out a total of 6 suitcases over clothes over 6mths I was there).

Owner (Ann) would complain about other people in the park when you pay your rent at the office so I had to change to paying through my bank didn't want to listen to this every time I paid rent

It's a good 25mins drive into town on a good day.

Would not recommend this park at all.
Was way over priced for a pretty average Caravan Park, wouldn't recommend!
Drove in and found the park full of permanents. Not for us and $52 for a site, no way. Left and drove on.

A nice tidy park. Clean and well organised facilities. The staff were helpful and friendly.
It has a nice clean pool. Good location close to Cairns and Babinda.
The park has a lot of permanent residents who all seemed friendly.

We felt like we were staying in a botanic garden! Green grassy sites and luscious tropical plants are abundant. Friendly helpful staff and top class Thai food on Saturday nights with music. Best park we have been to in all our travels.

The most friendliest park Saturday night a beautiful  meal as ann is a chef so guaranteed a good meal and entertainment afterwards 2nd time there will go back thanks Ann and Dave will recond to anyone book on time dogs are also welcome and only 25 kms from Cairn.
Sehr freundliche Betreiber, alles sauber und ordentlich. Kleines Flüsschen vom Platz aus erreichbar.

Beautiful clean park. Big spots ..a bit of road noise.
Dave and Ann wonderful hosts..Ann cooked up some awesome Thai food Saturday night which we enjoyed with fellow travellers while listening to live music.
Great place to stay  ,very friendly, will be staying again,not far to cains ,dog friendly

We spent a week without this campsite near Cairns but far from the effervescence of the big city and also close to Babinda. The campsite is family, very well kept. The price is fair and lower than other campsites in Cairns. The leaves are welcoming. My son loved the biscuits and chocolates received his stay. The campsite is clean, well maintained and very quiet. We highly recommend if to visit the Cairns area, one of the best campsites we are doing during our stay in Australia
Loved our stay. Fortunately we stayed over a Saturday night. Ann cooks an amazing Thai meal. $20 per head and worth every cent. Thank you both.

Great parked bus, pool cool but loved going for a swim each day. Great service, supplied antenna cable and longer extension cord for us. Great meal for twenty dollars in Saturday nights with live music.

Spent 2 nights in our van at Fishery Falls so we could visit the local National parks.
Dave and his wife couldn't be more helpful.
We stayed on Saturday night so there for the Curry night and live music. Great night :)

I am very pleased with my experience at this caravan park. The owners and staff are amazing people and always make sure everything works very well. I just want to double thank you Ann for the amazing Food you cooked for us, that was delicious 😋

Stayed in there safari tent it had a double bed which was very comfortable also had a tv and a full size fridge which come in very handy also had a fan above the bed and a air cooler for those warm days and nights then out on the veranda had a table and chairs..I couldn’t say nothing bad about it was a great holiday park..also had a nice swimming pool for those hot days.

Fantastisk sted lige ned til floden med bjergene i baggrunden. Oplagt for fiskere. Vi overnattede en enkelt nat og alt var flot rent og velholdt. Sjovt mini party med live musik om lørdagen med thai mad. Super flinke værter. Vi kan varmt anbefale dette sted.

Had a lovely restful stay here in our caravan.
Saturday night was fun with music and great Thai food cooked by Ann. Thanks Ann
Great spot, very clean park and amenities. Stopped over on the Saturday night when the Thai food was on. So good and meals were huge. We had a great stay. Thanks team. See you again.
Small quiet park, clean amenities.

Absolutely brilliant setting, spent a week surrounded by manicure gardening, and very welcoming and accommodating hosts David and Ann . Very clean amenities and camp kitchen, highly recommended.Thoroughly enjoyed our stay. We will definitely be back
Great place to stay, very clean park, very clean amenities, owners were very helpful and friendly, would recommend staying there.

Just arrived, first time here. Good size sites. Friendly owners in Ann and Dave. 15ks south of Gordonvale. Amenities are clean there is a pool. Quite a few long termers who make you feel welcome.  Optus reception not the best.
Great hidden jem, fresh water creek swimming, friendly staff best price will be back.
Best park stay in Qld, would have loved too see the Falls
Great caravan park with nice and quiet creek. The staff are super friendly and helpful. The amenities are the cleanest we've been in so far in our travels. We would definitely go back!
Wonderful camp grounds. Like you're in the middle of the rainforest. Beautiful surroundings. Very good facilities. We loved it here. Very nice & caring staff. We'd come back again.

Anne n Dave do a wonderful  job park beautifully  kept they are friendly n helpful. Site are lovely little garden each side. Thai nights n live music
Enjoyed our stay but wasn't game to get into creek.

A mate and i stayed here as a last minute stop over on our way home and had the pleasure of meeting Gail and Tassie as the owners were away on holidays, was the best service and hospitality I'd ever had at a caravan park very accommodating and helpful showed us around the entire park, will definitely be back with my family and friends when we are back carins way, who ever reads this do yourself a favour and stay a night or a month you will definitely be back, thank you again Gail and Tassie you made our stay extremely comfortable cheers Kyle and Carrot hahaha
Lovely well maintained caravan park. Owners Dave & Ann are super helpful and accommodating. They cook up fabulous Thai food on Saturday nights which is a great night with live music too.
Awesome location, very clean and well-maintained park, cabins and amenities were very nice, definitely will be my regular go to holiday destination from now on.

We spent just over two weeks here at Fishery Falls Holiday Park recently & we cannot recommend this park highly enough.
Dave & Anne go above & beyond to make sure their guests at the park are happy & comfortable. The grounds beautiful, well maintained & the sites are of ample size. There is a nice pool and area plus a good size camp kitchen.
A Saturday night dinner & entertainment is provided for all, at a small charge, this meal is provided & prepared by the owners Dave and Anne & no one goes to bed hungry.
All amenities are great & very well maintained we were impressed with service provided.
The location of this park we found ideal because it was lovely and quiet & an easy drive into Cairns, Innisfail or lots of other destinations. There was also a couple of decent size supermarkets between the park & Cairns.
We found Dave & Anne the most gracious & “down to earth “ hosts/people you could ever meet & we highly recommend this park to everyone. We will be staying there again next year for sure!

I had a wonderful time at Fishery Falls Holiday Park. The staff were very friendly and helpful, and the location was perfect for exploring the area. The park was clean and well-maintained, and the creek was beautiful. I would highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a relaxing and enjoyable stay
Super helpful and friendly hosts!, Very accommodating to the wary tired traveler, lush, beautiful tropical park. Immaculately clean, and tidy amenities. Stones throw to Cairns, highly recommend :)

Awesome people and place!!! Close to Cairns and surrounding areas!! Out of the rat race!! Huge sites!! Really well maintained park and amenities! Well appointed camp kitchen and able to swim in fishery creek at the camp ground at the bottom of the park! Pets welcome! Can't fault it! Owners fantastic!! Bonus Thai food nights and music in the peak season!! LOVED IT!!

This is not the first time that we stayed at this property. Whether we are coming to Cairns for work or leisure we always book our stay in here. So many things to love about this place, location, entertainment, service, food, clean rooms and importantly for the hospitality of the owners. We can't wait to go back again. Note:  Be sure to book ahead as they are always booked out.

Fabulous small park, Dave & Ann are perfect hosts. The shaded sites are neat with beautiful tropical plants between them. Saturday night Thai food dinner was delicious. Amenities are clean, and being only 40 km south of Cairns, its definitely worth staying here …. we’ll be back.

The best place we have ever
stayed. We stayed on a Saturday night and Ann and Dave cooked everyone a delicious meal (super filled meal) for great value for money. After that we all danced to the live band that was playing! The next day way we all went for a swim in the fresh water creek at the back of their property!
We felt like we had our own piece of heaven in FNQ.
Will definitely be staying again some time!
I'm very fortunate to have found this amazing place, the grounds, staff and owners are absolutely fabulous. I'll definitely be back.

Stayed at fishery falls caravan park a few times now and it never disappoints👍 weather it's in my caravan or staying in one of there beautiful cabins
Very well maintained Park and owners David and Ann go above and beyond to make sure you enjoy your stay
Love coming here!! ⭐⭐👍

Our two visits to the Fishery Falls Holiday Park have been excellent. Ann and David are wonderful hosts, who always make us feel welcome, and our stay as relaxing as possible.

Do not miss Saturday night happy hour during the dry season - the amazing Thai food prepared by Ann and David, along with the music and dancing, makes for a memorable evening.

The van sites are large, clean and private.

The park and its gardens are very well maintained and peaceful. The toilets are always clean and well lit, and the camp kitchen is centrally located and a great meeting place, with a large TV, bbqs and fridges.

We have stayed in both dry season and wet season, and can recommend a trip at either time.

Fishery Falls is located on the Bruce Highway, a short 30 minute drive south of Cairns, and if you are heading north from Innisfail, make Fishery Falls Holiday Park your next stop.
Amazing place to stay. Dave & Anne are the best. Thai night is great.

Fishery Falls caravan Park is a great little park with clean amenities and very close to Cairns & New local shopping center
Dave & Ann are brilliant host along with the staff ( Tas & Gail ).went there for 2  weeks & stayed for 3 mths while waiting to purchase our new home
Have stayed in most parks in the region but found this park more friendly and homely than any of the others
Would highly recommend
Will visit again especially on the weekends for Saturday night Thai & live music
Great place ...love it the owners Dave and Anne were very helpful and where so friendly.great place to stop for a break.
Love love love good location good food big area friendly staff

What a fantastic place to stay. We stayed in one of the units, which was spacious, clean and tidy. The owners are absolutely wonderful. They are down to earth and a ways to talk to. We particularly enjoyed that the place wasn’t jam packed. There are trees around, which compliments the North Queensland atmosphere. We also stayed on a Saturday and took advantage of the dinner that was put on and it was unbelievable!! We certainly did not go to bed hungry. I was blown away by the experience and will certainly stay there again.
Great location, very clean and well maintained park. The live music and Thai food night was a bonus. Great staff, will be back.
Great location, clean amenities, very well maintained park.
Great location, clean amenities, very well maintained park.

We lived at Fishery Falls  Holiday Park for 4 months while we built our new home at Babinda. Loved every  minute there. So clean and tidy. I'm not kidding you could not see one speck of dirt in the amenities at all.
Ann and Dave were so wonderful.
Then we discovered  their Thai Food nights cooked by Ann .
And live music and dancing always a great and fun evening.
So now we go every chance we have.
Fishery is 10 mins to Gordonvale for supplies. Cairns is about 30 mins drive
15 mins to Babinda  for best cream buns  oh and The Babinda Boulders.
Absolutely delightful experience! The caravan park's picturesque setting, impeccable facilities, and friendly staff made our stay truly memorable. Can't wait to visit again!

Caravan stay. Nice quiet little park. Sites large and concrete or grass. Amenities nice and clean and good water pressure. Camp kitchen has all conveniences. Pub next door serves good meals at reasonable price

Great location, clean amenities, very well maintained park. Not too far away from the town centre and supermarkets. The Thai night with live music and food is the absolute highlight! Ann and Dave are amazing, very friendly and accommodating. Will definitely come back to this beautiful place.
Stayed for 4 nights so beautiful there, not far to drive to cairns or surroundings. Supermarket around 10 mins away. But the best thing is the owners and staff are absolutely amazing.

We camped at Fishery Falls, they have very clean amenities & camp kitchens. The owner & wife are very accommodating, every Saturday they have a Thai night with live music which she cooks.
The location wasn’t too far from Cairns & near supermarkets. Unfortunately when we went it rained most the time and the grass area we were staying in got very boggy, not their fault

A lovely green peaceful spot. Well maintained and clean amenities. The Saturday night live music and Thai food was a bonus. Good value for $20. Per person. The creek at the back of the site was pretty and you could swim in it, but a bit hard to get to if you have old knees. My only negative is that it is a bit far from anything if you want to tour around and sightsee.

Lovely little park close to the Russell and Mulgrave rivers. Put the boat in and caught a rippa Flathead. |Owners are lovely and the park is extremely well maintained. Stopped in on our way to Cape York, and liked it so much we stopped in on our way home too.

A friend and I travelling on motorbikes in early July last year were caught in bad weather where we were riding in rain and the coldest day in Cairns in 66 years of kept records (10 Degrees C) . We arrived late, cold, wet and looking for accomodation. Fortunately we were able to find accomodation in a donga housed within a huge shed which allowed us to dry out. On arrival and signing in we were asked if we had eaten and what were we doing for tea? I responded that we had a musli bar in the tank bag which, was not acceptable to the owners (sorry but can't recall their names) who promptly went back and bought out two servings of Curry Thai chicken and rice ; one for each of us that was greatfully accepted and throughly enjoyed. They refused payment for the meal. Thank you for your caring and kindness. Their kindness and friendlyness extended to the whole of our stay with them. A big thumbs up from us.

Love the place, cabins comfortable, beds comfy, quiet, close to nature, service second to none, host so accommodating, live music and Thai, Saturday nights in season, even when raining still a great place

Quiet sleepy town with a lovely caravan park. Clean amenities, well maintained park, friendly staff. Saturday night $20 Thai night with live music & dancing is well worth it. Access to the swimming hole at the creek. Note: there is no access to the falls and the pub out the front is closed until further notice.
This is the best campsite I have ever visited . Everything we could have wished for was supplied and all spotlessly clean.

Surrounded by tropical rainforests and cascading creeks, fishery falls encompasses what this stunning part of the NQ region has to offer.  |We were visiting this region for a football carnival (which was nice and close to the grounds) but wish we stayed longer to explore the area south of Cairns to utilise the ideal location of the fishery falls park. |We stayed in a cabin which comfortably accommodated our family of 4.  The cabin was close to a camp kitchen for bigger cook ups with friends on the BBQ.  The linen and pillows was very comfortable and enough towels provided for our stay.  There is a laundry and a bigger camp kitchen on the grounds about 20m away from the cabin we stayed in. |The creek ran behind the cabin and we could here the sounds of the creek from our cabin which was beautiful.  When the kids weren’t at the footy carnival they were swimming in the cool waters of the crystal clear creek. |We were so fortunate to be at the park for a night of traditional Thai cooking provided by the managers of the park.  Probably the best Thai food I had ever eaten I felt very spoilt with all that this place had to offer.  For a quality park experience I was so impressed with what this hidden gem had to offer and can’t wait to go back.

Stayed here for 4 nights to do Atherton Tablelands, The Boulders and Josephine falls.  Such a beautiful and peaceful caravan park.. large sites surrounded by palms.. very clean amenities, very friendly staff, would highly recommend a stay it is so well maintained 👍🏼🥰
Not far for visting Cairns. Park felt closed in, clean amenities
We had an awesome stay here on a site down near the creek. Great location, the staff were amazing and the Thai night was fantastic. Highly recommend this caravan park.

3 night powered sites. Great little park, fabulous owners, very clean and tidy. Everyone very friendly and helpful.  We will be back
Kim & Cyril
Great caravan park with green good sites
